channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Air Zimbabwe to resume direct London flights after 15-year absence @nehandaradio
item.description: Air Zimbabwe will resume direct flights between Harare and London by the end of July, restoring a route that has been suspended since 2011. The post Air Zimbabwe to resume direct London flights after 15-year absence appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zulu King to meet Mnangagwa over anti-immigrant tensions in South Africa @nehandaradio
item.description: AmaZulu King Misuzulu and King Ndamase are set to meet President Emmerson Mnangagwa as regional leaders seek solutions to growing anti-immigrant tensions in South Africa. The post Zulu King to meet Mnangagwa over anti-immigrant tensions in South Africa appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.description: Tapiwa ChirumeSTAFF WRITERGLOBAL aviation heavyweight Etihad Airways has struck a massive commercial partnership with Fastjet Zimbabwe, transforming air travel into the country.The... item.title: Sweden demands inclusive child protection systems
item.description: Hazel Marimbizain Bulawayo SWEDEN has implored Zimbabwe to place children with disabilities at the centre of its child protection efforts, warning that... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subs #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe needs economic renewal not term extensions, Malema’s EFF condemns Constitutional Amendment Act 3 @EFFSouthAfrica @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: South Africa’s opposition Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) has condemned the enactment of Zimbabwe’s Constitutional Amendment Act No.3, accusing ZANU PF of prioritising its grip on power over the welfare of citizens and betraying the ethos of the liberation struggle. President Emmerson Mnangagwa on Tuesday signed Constitutional Amendment Act No. 3 into law after Parliament passed [...] The post Zimbabwe needs economic renewal not term extensions, Malema’s EFF condemns Constitutional Amendment Act 3 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: South African traditional leaders to meet Mnangagwa to discuss migration tensions
item.description: TimesLive AmaZulu King Misuzulu kaZwelithini and King of AmaMpondo aseMnyandeni Ndamase Ndamase are due to lead a regional diplomatic drive to tackle growing tensions over migration, with Zimbabwe becoming the first stop in an effort by South African monarchs to engage SADC heads of state and fellow royals on the issue. Ndamase, the acting chair [...] The post South African traditional leaders to meet Mnangagwa to discuss migration tensions appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe transfers wildlife to Equatorial Guinea under conservation deal
item.description: Zimbabwe has begun capturing and relocating selected wildlife species to Equatorial Guinea under a government-to-government conservation agreement aimed at restoring animal populations in the Central African country’s protected areas. The Zimbabwe Parks and Wildlife Management Authority (ZimParks) said the translocation follows a formal request from the Government of Equatorial Guinea for technical assistance to rebuild [...] The post Zimbabwe transfers wildlife to Equatorial Guinea under conservation deal appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe prosecuted 53 high-profile corruption cases, recovered US$51.2 million in criminal assets in 2025
item.description: THE National Prosecuting Authority of Zimbabwe (NPAZ) says it completed 53 high-profile corruption and economic crime cases in 2025, achieving a 77.94% case clearance rate. Deputy Prosecutor General Chris Mutangadura said the cases were handled by the NPA’s Economic Crimes and Anti-Corruption Unit, a specialised division established to prosecute corruption, complex financial crimes, money laundering [...] The post Zimbabwe prosecuted 53 high-profile corruption cases, recovered US$51.2 million in criminal assets in 2025 appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Canada applauds Zimbabwe’s Whistleblower Bill, urges swift action against corruption
item.description: CANADA has welcomed Zimbabwe’s move to gazette the Whistleblower Protection Bill, describing it as a major step towards strengthening accountability and protecting individuals who expose corruption and other wrongdoing in the public interest. Speaking at the Integrity and Accountability Summit organised by Transparency International Zimbabwe (TIZ) in Harare, Canada’s Ambassador Adler Aristilde said the proposed [...] The post Canada applauds Zimbabwe’s Whistleblower Bill, urges swift action against corruption appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Can a president who goes back on his word ever be trusted? @bulawayo24
item.description: Trust, like the soul, never returns once it is gone.When a nation’s leader repeatedly looks into the eyes of his citizens and pledges absolute fidelity to the supreme law of the land, his word becomes... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Two miners die in Kwekwe shaft collapse @bulawayo24 @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: KWEKWE – Two miners died and three others escaped after a shaft collapse at Migilant Mine in Kwekwe on 7 July 2026 at around 1900 hours, the Zimbabwe Republic Police have confirmed.Midlands Provincial... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: UK Police Name Zimbabwe-Born British Citizen Sought Over Suspected Triple Murder
item.description: LONDON – British police have identified a Zimbabwe-born British citizen as the prime suspect in the alleged murder of his wife and two young daughters after their bodies were discovered at their home in Great Denham, prompting an international manhunt. According to Sky News, Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, 45, who is also known as Mark, is [...] The post UK Police Name Zimbabwe-Born British Citizen Sought Over Suspected Triple Murder appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: IMF Backs Zimbabwe’s Reform Progress as Staff-Level Deal Boosts Debt Clearance and Currency Reform Agenda
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe has moved a step closer to restoring relations with international financial institutions after the International Monetary Fund reached a staff-level agreement with the government on the first review of its 10-month Staff-Monitored Programme (SMP), signalling growing confidence in the country’s macroeconomic stabilisation efforts and reform agenda. The agreement, which remains subject to [...] The post IMF Backs Zimbabwe’s Reform Progress as Staff-Level Deal Boosts Debt Clearance and Currency Reform Agenda appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Private Hospitals Barred From Refusing Emergency Patients Regardless of Ability to Pay
item.description: Private Hospitals Barred From Refusing Emergency Patients Under New Law Private hospitals and other health institutions in Zimbabwe will now be legally required to admit and treat patients with life-threatening medical conditions, regardless of whether they can afford to pay, following changes to the Medical Services Act. The amendments, published in the Government Gazette on [...] The post Private Hospitals Barred From Refusing Emergency Patients Regardless of Ability to Pay appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: UK: Woman And 2 Kids Found Dead
item.description: By A Correspondent | ZimEye | Bedfordshire Police have released a CCTV image of a man wanted in connection with... Continue reading "UK: Woman And 2 Kids Found Dead" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: UK police launch international manhunt for suspect believed to have fled to Zimbabwe after murdering wife, two daughters
item.description: Agencies A Zimbabwean-born man is the subject of an international manhunt after police named him as the prime suspect in the alleged murder of his wife and two young daughters at their home in Bedfordshire, before he is believed to have fled to Zimbabwe. Bedfordshire Police identified the suspect as Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, 45, who [...] The post UK police launch international manhunt for suspect believed to have fled to Zimbabwe after murdering wife, two daughters appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
